# Boox fixtures

Synthetic Onyx Boox `.note` file for `tests/test_boox.py`, generated by
`make_fixture.py` in this directory:

```sh
uv run python tests/fixtures/boox/make_fixture.py
```

- `boox-synthetic.note` — single-note archive, one 1860x2480 page with a
  ballpoint stroke (pen 2, blue), a pressure-varied fountain stroke
  (pen 5, black), a highlighter stroke (pen 15, yellow) translated by a
  shape transform matrix, and a text box (pen 6).

## Provenance

This is NOT a file from a real device and contains no third-party data.
The generator reimplements the container layout from the format facts
documented in `docs/formats/boox.md` (zip member layout, big-endian
`#points` blob + trailing index, shape/note_info protobufs), which were
reverse-engineered empirically and cross-checked against the MIT-licensed
format documentation of github.com/nrontsis/boox-note-optimizer.

Fixture license: CC0 (like all self-made fixtures in this repo).
